description: The Socioboard 'user-service' microservice (managed by PM2) is failing to start because another rogue process is occupying its required network port (3000). Restore the 'user-service' in PM2 by identifying and terminating the rogue process occupying port 3000. The service must be successfully running and listening on its original designated port. You MUST NOT modify the 'user-service' configuration file (/opt/socioboard/socioboard-api/user/config/development.json) or change the port it runs on.
